scripts.check:syntax: find src -name '*.mjs' -exec node --check {} \; && find test -name '*.test.mjs' -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.check:imports: node -e 'Promise.all([import("./src/state-store.mjs"), import("./src/task-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/goal-files.mjs"), import("./src/goal-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/goal-task-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/diagnostics-service.mjs"), import("./src/codex-run-metadata.mjs"), import("./src/worker-queue-counts.mjs")]).then(() => console.log("imports ok")).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })'
